results.title: Liverpool can only make ONE specific signing thanks to Premier League rule
results.description: Liverpool could find it a tad tough to make new signings in the window this summer

results.title: Strong Q2 '26 results with €255 million net profit, RoTCE 28.7% and CIR 31.0%; [IR News]
results.description: Further strengthening capital in preparation for planned acquisition of PTSB - Delivering strong Q2 '26 results: Net profit of €255 million, supported by continued revenue growth and ongoing synergy gains - Highly profitable business model: Q2 '26 RoTCE of 28.7% well above BAWAG's >20% through-the-cycle target - Excess capital: CET1 ratio of 17.4% with excess capital of €1.05 billion above 12.5% CET1 target - PTSB as strategic opportunity in Ireland: Capital build in first half of 2026 allows for fully self-funding of the transaction, which is subject to shareholder, High court, and regulatory approvals. PTSB shareholder scheme vote scheduled for July 30, 2026

results.title: Why is Iran bombing Gulf states while avoiding US naval assets and Israel?
results.description: Iran has adopted a strange and risky strategy in its ongoing conflict with the United States. As the US attacks on Tehran increase, they are responding, but surprisingly, they are targeting the military and civilian infrastructure of neighboring Gulf states such as Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan.

results.title: Nicaragua's Ortega says 'never again' for elections after two decades in power
results.description: Ortega, who has continuously held power since 2007 following an earlier presidential term in the 1980s, said the move will close off any path to the opposition, although he did not provide details about carrying out the ban

results.title: Uzbekistan State Debt Reaches US$46.9 Billion
results.description: Uzbekistan's state debt reached US$46.9 billion or 31.9% of GDP as of 1 January 2026, according to the Fiscal Strategy for 2027–2029.

results.title: Minister Umahi and the woman from òkè òhún
results.description: A few years ago, a man was rushed to the family pharmacy. It was late at night. He had contracted the Yoruba’s response to promiscuity, Mágùn, known in the modern parlance as thunderbolt. About four elderly men brought the ‘patient’ in a very bad shape. results.title: Fifth column

results.title: Coalition pledges $350 million to finish stalled Wonthaggi Hospital
results.description: A Liberal and Nationals government would spend $350 million to finish the Wonthaggi Hospital redevelopment if it wins the November election.
